of checks (all must pass, else revert):      1. not paused;      2. amount > 0 and borrower != 0;      3. CAN verified + nonce consumed by the verifier (type/version/targetChain/         targetPool==address(this)/expiry/replay/ed25519 policy signature);      4. amount <= note.max_draw;      5. enough free liquidity;      then funds are sent to `borrower`, debt is increased, and an exposure draw      report is emitted for relaying back to Casper.","params":{"amount":"Draw amount in USDC base units; must be <= note.max_draw.","borrower":"Recipient of the drawn USDC (the agent's bound EVM address).","canonicalSigningBytes":"Exact canonical JSON the policy key signed.","commitment":"keccak structural commitment over the CAN (relayer-derived).","note":"The CAN struct (mirrors the canonical standard).","signature":"64-byte ed25519 Casper policy signature."}},"repay(string,uint256,bytes32)":{"params":{"noteNonce":"The nonce of the note this repayment settles (for Casper linkage;                  pass bytes32(0) for a generic repayment)."}}},"stateVariables":{"_debt":{"details":"Per-agent outstanding debt in USDC base units."},"liquidityOf":{"details":"LP balance accounting (1:1 with deposited base units; no interest model)."}},"title":"Cred402CreditVault","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"availableLiquidity()":{"notice":"Free USDC available to draw or withdraw. Caller must have approved `amount`."},"draw((string,string,string,string,string,address,string,string,uint32,uint32,string,uint64,bytes32),bytes,bytes32,bytes,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Draw `amount` of credit against a Casper-policy-signed CAN."},"repay(string,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Repay outstanding credit for an agent. Caller must have approved `amount`."},"totalLiquidity()":{"notice":"Total USDC principal supplied by liquidity providers (bookkeeping)."},"totalOutstanding()":{"notice":"Outstanding principal drawn and not yet repaid, across all agents."},"withdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw previously supplied liquidity, up to the provider's balance and         the vault's free (undrawn) USDC."}},"notice":"ERC20 (USDC) credit vault for a Cred402 EVM satellite. Liquidity providers         deposit/withdraw USDC; agents draw credit **only** against a valid,         unexpired, target-matching, Casper-policy-signed Credit Authorization Note         (CAN), and **never** beyond `CAN.max_draw`. Each note is single-use. Draws         and repayments emit exposure reports relayed back to Casper, which adjusts         the `GlobalExposureManager` and prevents multi-chain over-borrow.         \"EVM executes credit; Casper approves credit.\" All amounts are USDC base units (6dp). `1 USD micro-unit == 1 USDC base unit`.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/Cred402CreditVault.sol":"Cred402CreditVault"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/Cred402CreditNoteVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe3663c594cdaed71afc557173e7fed72c950525ee8ea9098304fc5e2a832bbc4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ebcc7ea390f03bb51a3672ec5cf385e9e7dd8c03c9613cbf2ad09c33cf83aeec","dweb:/ipfs/QmcXUE8HSeRpA7MHMcUJH49CAPEbCAd6PFu8oeXmNhGQFQ"]},"src/Cred402CreditVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9c4d2461ba48d6051faed37cb377b74561dd3c58b19d70e431fe47a3d2554d18","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://55bc85a4495406b1e543dd40684c9f89101c9c7fcb5a5f8412d9ee27c4655a4f","dweb:/ipfs/QmbcEdoUvPCmicMohyCgfSMft5b4DFC9GjNKMi898sMy7U"]},"src/Cred402EmergencyPause.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8ed9393a363e071dcd8ff3c1cd7b8f1b21f6df45f7aae540393b39548f452e20","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8fdd50473f8e6536afe89eafeca5a7934d77c3758d87fbcb1e25eef45e9f80a1","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc59ERNs7jmJ3c6XGyUwgpUwCivPztLQfPDoN6zbkMpUL"]},"src/Cred402ExposureReporter.sol":{"keccak256":"0x98df78c2ca8d0476e7407fbf03c461ad248e0c1bfc287e3efb5ef6b85b78405f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a9052531896e9debfbabb83a93c98b879c0403cd489c6bea8902acaca7629fcd","dweb:/ipfs/QmVrNkFb52RUzVkrapQNeBd3jnZrqg856CEEX6GcG9R6y1"]},"src/interfaces/ICasperSigVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2d7fc6bbab95cd786fb46cdc8e5e3522b58ef108aa688d88c7c6182467f8ee37","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5e156c0b6f8cfbe17c6cf03bfd4dba9ce9588c15001e25950f345be172f1c787","dweb:/ipfs/QmZshSztDKMAeLt9zkW1StgZDUHed8C3hwBPBKVoz6voFK"]}},"version":1}

draw((string,string,string,string,string.details: Order of checks (all must pass, else revert):      1. not paused;      2. amount > 0 and borrower != 0;      3. CAN verified + nonce consumed by the verifier (type/version/targetChain/         targetPool==address(this)/expiry/replay/ed25519 policy signature);      4. amount <= note.max_draw;      5. enough free liquidity;      then funds are sent to `borrower`, debt is increased, and an exposure draw      report is emitted for relaying back to Casper.

params.amount: Draw amount in USDC base units; must be <= note.max_draw.
params.borrower: Recipient of the drawn USDC (the agent's bound EVM address).
params.canonicalSigningBytes: Exact canonical JSON the policy key signed.
params.commitment: keccak structural commitment over the CAN (relayer-derived).
params.note: The CAN struct (mirrors the canonical standard).

params.noteNonce: The nonce of the note this repayment settles (for Casper linkage;                  pass bytes32(0) for a generic repayment).

availableLiquidity().notice: Free USDC available to draw or withdraw. Drawn principal has already left         the vault, so the held USDC balance is exactly the free pool.

deposit(uint256).notice: Supply USDC liquidity to the vault. Caller must have approved `amount`.

draw((string,string,string,string,string.notice: Draw `amount` of credit against a Casper-policy-signed CAN.

repay(string,uint256,bytes32).notice: Repay outstanding credit for an agent. Caller must have approved `amount`.

totalLiquidity().notice: Total USDC principal supplied by liquidity providers (bookkeeping).

totalOutstanding().notice: Outstanding principal drawn and not yet repaid, across all agents.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw previously supplied liquidity, up to the provider's balance and         the vault's free (undrawn) USDC.
